Description: http://thefacebook.com/ goes live. Signup is fast but retention is unclear. No dedicated growth team exists yet.
Title: Launch at Harvard

Description: Facebook opens to more colleges. Signups grow but a large % of users sign up, visit once or twice, then disappear. The team notices the pattern but doesn't yet understand why.
Title: Expansion + churn problem emerges

Description: He inherits a product with strong top-of-funnel but broken retention. His mandate: figure out why users stay or leave — and build systems to fix it.
Title: Chamath Palihapitiya joins as VP of Growth

Description: The growth team runs a massive cohort analysis. They find the magic number that changes everything.
Title: The data analysis & the insight
